items.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs

items.title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
items.summary: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.

items.summary: AI startup Anthropic has launched Claude Tag, a new Slack-native AI experience, replacing its previous chatbot. This "inline" agent seamlessly integrates into team workflows, assisting with diverse tasks by leveraging organizational tools and context. Claude Tag, powered by th…

items.title: India can build sovereign AI, but can it build an AI-ready workforce?
items.summary: While India’s AI infrastructure and computing capabilities get billions of dollars in investment, the harder task is preparing professionals for an economy where AI changes how value is created.

items.title: India among top AI-ready nations, one of world's least concentrated equity markets: J.P. Morgan
items.summary: India has emerged as one of the top countries in artificial intelligence (AI) readiness, trailing only the U.S. and China, while remaining one of the world's least concentrated equity markets, according to a recent report by J.P. Morgan.

items.title: Talk of a bubble is an 'insult to AI' says SoftBank's Son
items.summary: Masayoshi Son, SoftBank's CEO, dismissed concerns about an AI bubble, calling it an "insult to AI" and emphasising its nascent stage with vast potential. He reiterated SoftBank's role as an "egg-laying factory" and expressed frustration over the company's market valuation comp…

Generative AI expanding role in shopping, to enable AI-led purchases: Report

items.title: MoEngage Acquires US-Based AI Startup Aampe To Scale Agentic Marketing
items.summary: SaaS major MoEngage has acquired San Francisco-based AI infrastructure startup Aampe to strengthen its customer engagement stack. In a statement,…

items.title: AI will not take your job, but it will take your excuses, say finance leaders at JLL roundtable
items.summary: STRAPLINE: At a JLL roundtable, CFOs and finance leaders traded boardroom war stories on AI, Gen Z hiring, and the hard lessons that come with building, scaling, and sometimes shutting down a business. Gayatri Guha Every founder's pitch deck tells a story of growth. What it ra…

careers.note: Demand snapshot for 2026. ML Engineer is the most in-demand AI title; agentic-AI and deep-learning skills carry the highest pay premiums; Python + one cloud is the baseline. Specialisation beats generalisation for freshers.

paths.note: #1 AI title — build, deploy & maintain models in production. Best all-round entry into AI.
RAG, tool-use & multi-agent systems. ~40% of enterprise apps will embed AI agents by year-end.
Neural nets for vision & speech. Highest premiums; usually needs strong maths / grad study.
Ship & scale models on the cloud. Cloud AI certs add 20–25% to salary.
Foundational, widest entry door; a reliable first step into AI.
Imaging, robotics, autonomous systems, medical AI.
Powers chatbots, search & agents — the hottest application area.
5–8 yrs experience; $140k–$332k bands. Translates AI into business value.
Alignment, evals, red-teaming & policy — newer but expanding fast.

fresher.why: The lingua franca of ML — non-negotiable.
Linear algebra, probability & calculus — enough to reason about models.
Regression, classification, evaluation, the ML workflow.
Build & train neural nets; PyTorch dominates research & jobs.
Ship a small LLM app — the most visible skill to recruiters now.
Real AI work is mostly data; SQL is everywhere.
AWS leads (~40% of postings), then Azure & GCP. Version everything.
A deployed project that solves a real problem is the #1 differentiator.

experienced.why: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, model/versioning — production is where value lives.
Multi-agent orchestration, tool-use, evals — the surging frontier.
AWS/Azure/GCP architecture; certs add a 20–25% salary premium.
Adapt, measure and harden models for a domain.
Cost & latency engineering for large models.
Trade-offs across data, latency, cost & reliability at scale.
CV, NLP, recsys, healthcare — depth beats breadth at senior levels.
Leading teams and tying models to measurable outcomes.

profile.name: Harman Singh Sandhu
profile.blurb: I build AI/ML projects and write about them. This site is one of them — an automated daily AI digest.

repos.name: ai-weekly-report
repos.desc: My personalized AI newsletter that runs on an agentic AI

repos.name: Ace-rentals
repos.desc: Ace Rentals: A full-stack property rental platform built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Features user authentication, image uploads, geocoding, reviews, and secure account management. Inspired by Airbnb.
